title: اَلْحَفِيْدَةُ الْمَرِيضَةُ
summary: Buvi va nabirasi o'rtasida kasallik hissi, qorin og'rig'i va kasalxonaga borish haqidagi suhbat.

dialogue.speaker: اَلْجَدَّةُ
dialogue.next: اَلْحَفِيدَةُ: أَشْعُرُ بِأَنَّنِي مَرِيضَةٌ يَا جَدَّتِي.

dialogue.speaker: اَلْحَفِيدَةُ
dialogue.translationUz: Men kasal ekanligimni his qilyapman, buvijon.

dialogue.speaker: اَلْجَدَّةُ
dialogue.next: اَلْحَفِيدَةُ: أَشْعُرُ بِأَلَمٍ شَدِيدٍ فِي بَطْنِي.

dialogue.speaker: اَلْحَفِيدَةُ
dialogue.next: اَلجَدَّةُ: شَفَاكِ اللهُ ، هَيَّا نَذْهَبْ إِلَى الْمُسْتَشْفَى.

dialogue.speaker: اَلْجَدَّةُ
dialogue.text: شَفَاكِ اللهُ ، هَيَّا نَذْهَبْ إِلَى الْمُسْتَشْفَى.
dialogue.translationUz: Alloh sizga shifo bersin, haydi kasalxonaga boraylik.

context.pattern: sadness_question → sickness_feeling → concern_question → pain_location → suggestion_and_blessing → acceptance
